visuals.title: SLR Table Construction Process
visuals.description: Visual diagram for SLR Table Construction Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Construction of SLR Parsing Tables</text>
  
  <!-- Grammar Box -->
  <rect x="30" y="50" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Grammar
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- LR(0) Items Box -->
  <rect x="30" y="110" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    LR(0) Items
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- DFA States Box -->
  <rect x="30" y="170" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    DFA States
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- FOLLOW Sets Box -->
  <rect x="30" y="230" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    FOLLOW Sets
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Parsing Table Box -->
  <rect x="270" y="140" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parsing Table
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Grammar to LR(0) Items -->
  <path d="M90,90 L90,110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from LR(0) Items to DFA States -->
  <path d="M90,150 L90,170" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from DFA States to FOLLOW Sets -->
  <path d="M90,210 L90,230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from FOLLOW Sets to Parsing Table -->
  <path d="M150,255 L270,165" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from DFA States to Parsing Table -->
  <path d="M150,185 L270,165" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Example Grammar -->
  <text x="210" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Example: E → E + T | T, T → T * F | F, F → (E) | id
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
